expectations.text: Flags generated artifacts instead of committing them automatically.
expectations.evidence: Staged changes contain generated-looking artifacts (playwright-report/index.html, test-results/session-flow/video.mp4).

expectations.text: Asks for confirmation before versioning those artifacts.
expectations.evidence: Ask the user if they want to commit these generated artifacts or unstage them.

expectations.text: Does not plan a push or PR.
